title: Amtech T1130 TSA-Approved Combination Travel Padlock, 3 Digit Combination Suitcase Lock, Travel Luggage Lock for Suitcases, Travel Bags, Backpacks, Lockers, Gym, Bike Locks, (Black)
features: TSA-APPROVED: This sturdy travel padlock is TSA-approved
3-DIGIT COMBINATION LOCK: It has a 3-digit combination lock for added security
PERFECT FOR LUGGAGE: It is ideal for suitcases, backpacks and other luggage
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: This Amtech T1130 black combination travel padlock features a secure 3-digit combination for extra security. The lock is approved by the TSA (Transportation Security Administration) and is Travel Sentry Approved. This means your luggage can be inspected by the authorities without damages to your lock or bag. The travel luggage lock is perfect for use with suitcases, travel bags, backpacks, lockers and bikes.
